name: 6 Tier Shoe Rack - Brightroom™
description:
This 6 -Tier Shoe Rack from Brightroom™ is made from steel and sized perfectly to store 24 pairs of shoes neatly and within reach. Once assembled, place it freestanding in a closet or near your entryway for quick access to your favorite footwear as you head out the door.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
